steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: The line $y=34x+5$ has slope $34$. Since line $s$ is parallel to it, line $s$ also has slope $34$.

steps.title: Use the point on the line
steps.content:
Line $s$ passes through $(0,0)$, so its equation is
$$y=34x$$

steps.title: Evaluate at the given input
steps.content:
The point $(8,d)$ is on line $s$, so substitute $x=8$.
$$d=34(8)=272$$
The answer is 272.
